description_long: This is a weathered stone obelisk with a rectangular shaft rising from a broad, square base. The front face features vertical inscriptions in what appears to be Japanese kanji, deeply engraved into the stone. The surface is rough and mottled, showing signs of age, with some moss or lichen growth visible near the base. The obelisk stands on a textured, irregular stone or concrete platform, which is embedded with several round, numbered metal or stone markers. The tip of the obelisk is flat and unadorned, maintaining the geometric simplicity of the monument. The overall appearance suggests it serves as a commemorative or religious marker, likely found in a park, shrine, or cemetery setting.
description: A weathered stone obelisk with Japanese inscriptions on its front, standing on a square base and surrounded by a textured platform with round markers. The monument has a rough, aged surface and a flat, unadorned tip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the engraved Japanese kanji inscriptions and the detailed base with visible platform and round markers.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the plain, uninscribed back of the obelisk and the broad, square base.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the unadorned shaft and the layered structure of the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain surface of the obelisk and the arrangement of round markers on the platform.
attribute_inscription: Vertical Japanese kanji inscriptions are engraved on the front face of the obelisk, deeply incised and weathered but still legible.
attribute_base_design: The base is a broad, square plinth with a slightly raised platform, constructed from the same stone as the shaft. It is simple and unadorned, with some moss or lichen growth and surrounded by a textured stone or concrete platform embedded with round markers.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat, rectangular, and unadorned, matching the geometric simplicity of the shaft.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a textured, irregular platform with several round, numbered markers embedded in the surface.
